# PERF-86 negative: response is streamed via a pooled json.Encoder
lang: go
file: PERF-086-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"github.com/labstack/echo/v4"
)

type User struct {
	ID   int64  `json:"id"`
	Name string `json:"name"`
}

func GetUser(c echo.Context) error {
	u := User{ID: 1, Name: "x"}
	return json.NewEncoder(c.Response()).Encode(u)
}
